reference: Hello there. You could be experiencing a slipped disc that causes nerve pinching in the neck and radiating pain in the upper limbs. Avoid bending the neck and body forwards, lifting weights over your back, or with your hands. Apply a hot water bottle to the painful areas to get relief from the pain and muscle spasms. Take painkillers and muscle relaxants such as diclofenac and thiocolchicoside, which will provide good relief. Eat healthily, avoid stress, and consult an orthopedist for a proper examination and diagnosis, which will aid in the treatment.
text: Hello there. You could be experiencing a slipped disc that causes nerve pinching in the neck and radiating pain in the upper limbs. Avoid bending the neck and body forwards, lifting weights over your back or with your hands. Apply a hot water bottle to the painful areas to get relief from the pain and muscle spasms. Take painkillers and muscle relaxants such as diclofenac and thiococacoside, which will provide good relief. Eat healthily, avoid stress, and consult an orthopedist for a proper examination and diagnosis, which will aid in the treatment.
